introSection: Caterpiller is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Barmouth Amusement Park in Barmouth, Gwynedd, Wales, UK.
fullText: Caterpiller is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Barmouth Amusement Park in Barmouth, Gwynedd, Wales, UK.
